message:
bd-2xj.8: slo.yaml schema validation and breach detection tests

35 tests covering:
- Schema validation: valid YAML parsing, malformed thresholds (out-of-range,
  non-numeric), unknown metric types, duplicate metrics, tab rejection,
  noise_tolerance >= regression_threshold cross-validation, comments/blanks,
  invalid safe_mode_trigger values, empty YAML defaults
- Breach detection for all metric types: latency (absolute + ratio), memory
  (absolute + ratio), error rate (absolute + global fallback)
- Safe-mode trigger logic: explicit flag, error rate threshold, simultaneous
  breach count, noise-only exclusion, flag-only-on-actual-breach guard
- slo.check span emission with correct fields (metric_name, metric_type,
  baseline, current, ratio, severity), field value matching
- WARN for breach inside slo.check span, ERROR for safe-mode trigger
- End-to-end batch checks with mixed severities and safe-mode scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
